name: wilson-hexa-verify
description: Two hexa-atlas guards. PreToolUse: deny Bash invocations of non-hexa verifiers (sympy / PyPhi / wolframscript / mathematica / mathkernel), redirect to the hexa CLI — INERT unless `hexa` is on PATH. PostToolUse: when `hexa verify` reports a new SUPPORTED equation (🔵/🟢), prompt the agent to ship the atlas change to dancinlab/hexa-lang via the worktree-pr workflow (filling `hexa atlas promote`'s stubbed `pr` step). Standalone port + extension of wilson's guard-hexa-verify.
